title: HAProxy Backend Health Checks
description:
## HAProxy Backend Health Checks

HAProxy performs active health checks against backend pods to detect failures and remove unhealthy endpoints from rotation before a real request reaches them.

Which HAProxy Ingress annotation enables **HTTP-based** active health checks on backend pods?
explanation: `haproxy.org/check: 'true'` enables HAProxy's native active health checking for the backend. By default this sends a TCP probe; to use an HTTP probe, pair it with `haproxy.org/check-http: /healthz` (or another path) which configures an HTTP GET check against that path. The other options (`health-check`, `backend-healthcheck`, `probe`) are not valid HAProxy Ingress annotation keys.

hints.title: Combining check annotations
hints.body: Enable the check and specify an HTTP path together for HTTP-mode health checking.
